ideal_must_detect.matched_text: We do not collect credit card CVV, bank PINs, or e-wallet passcodes
no passports or government IDs requested by email
records are anonymized or securely shredded
from five trading days before to two trading days after

must_detect.matched_text:
TandemParc Holdings, Inc. (PH) Privacy Notice and Retention Workflow for HR, Tax, Banking, and Capital Markets Records
Data controller: TandemParc Holdings, Inc., 21F Orion Center, Makati City 1200, Philippines; DPO contact: dpo@tandemparc.ph (role mailbox)
Under the Data Privacy Act, personal data means any information from which an individual’s identity is apparent or can be reasonably and directly ascertained, or when put together with other information.
We process: employee numbers, payroll bank details, TIN (form field only: ___-___-___-___), generic HR files; and investor relations contact lists limited to business emails.
Bank references and BIR-related payroll withholding records are retained for 10 years for audit; account labels may appear (e.g., Account No.: 000-XYZ-1234) without full PAN or CVV.
Capital-markets records include drafts and final SEC 17-A, 17-Q, and 17-C; public copies are available via SEC and PSE EDGE and are not treated as confidential once posted (e.g., our Q1 2024 17-C on transfer agent change).
Press releases and website FAQs summarizing already-announced dividends from FY2022 remain public and are excluded from MNPI controls.
Employees with access to non-public draft 17-A/17-Q/17-C content must observe an internal blackout window from five trading days before to two trading days after public postin
